title: Harmony Bridge - REKT
relevance_summary: Compromised private keys used to drain funds from a bridge contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from a bridge contract to an external address without additional validation checks.
prevention.trigger: BRIDGE_CONTRACT -> SEND_FUNDS_TO_EXTERNAL_ADDRESS() without additional validation checks

red_flags: Draining large amounts of funds in a short period
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends funds from a bridge contract to an external address without additional validation checks.
summary: The Harmony Bridge was drained of over $100M by exploiting compromised private keys. A guard could have detected and blocked the transfer of funds without additional validation checks.
